overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic neon-lit city center during a rainy night. The vehicle drives through wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, passes under elevated highways and covered underpasses, and navigates moderate traffic through dense commercial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass approach with commercial storefronts

events.description: vehicle makes right turn at intersection with zebra crossing

agents.ego_description: driving forward under elevated highway structure then executing right turn at intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking on sidewalk near crosswalk

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure spanning across the road overhead
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway
yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on wet asphalt
illuminated storefront sign with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass with concrete support pillars lining the street. The vehicle drives forward on rain-slicked asphalt reflecting city lights, then executes a right turn at an intersection marked by yellow zebra crossings. Sparse pedestrians walk the sidewalks near neon-lit storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: cruising straight through dense commercial district with heavy neon signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving in parallel lane on the left

entered.detail: tall digital towers displaying rotating holographic commercials with blue and pink glow
tall commercial buildings with reflective glass surfaces
large flat digital displays mounted on building facades showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: Driving through a wide commercial corridor illuminated by intense neon and holographic advertisements. The street is lined with glass-facade buildings and digital billboards casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement. Moderate pedestrian activity on sidewalks and moderate vehicle traffic share the multi-lane road.

events.description: approaching and entering covered underpass structure with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: driving toward covered roadway entrance while navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving in left lane alongside ego vehicle

entered.detail: bright yellow futuristic taxi cab with illuminated roof sign
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk on the right side of the boulevard
dark tunnel entrance with concrete walls and overhead cover structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a boulevard lined with palm trees on the right, approaching a covered underpass structure ahead. A yellow taxi drives parallel in the left lane. The environment transitions from open neon-lit commercial area to the darker entrance of a covered roadway with concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with concrete walls

events.description: exiting covered underpass back into open urban environment

agents.ego_description: driving through covered roadway section with reduced lighting then emerging back to open street

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls forming the sides of the covered roadway
linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: Driving through an enclosed concrete underpass with artificial ceiling lighting and smooth gray walls. The sheltered roadway blocks the rain and sky visibility. The vehicle then exits the tunnel back into the open night environment, where the yellow taxi is now visible ahead in the center lane.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palm-lined boulevard with commercial towers

events.description: yellow taxi moves aside and red sedan becomes the primary vehicle ahead

agents.ego_description: following traffic through open boulevard, switching from following yellow taxi to red sedan

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: dark night sky visible above buildings after exiting the covered section
dark red four-door sedan with illuminated tail lights driving ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open palm-lined boulevard under the night sky with full visibility restored. The vehicle follows a yellow taxi initially, then shifts to following a red sedan as the taxi moves to the left. Commercial towers with neon signage line both sides of the wide multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial intersection with pedestrian activity

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection while following red sedan

agents.ego_description: following red sedan through dense commercial area and executing right turn at intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket crossing the street at the intersection

entered.detail: zebra crossing with yellow stripes and pedestrian crossing signals
tall mixed-use buildings with red and gray facades and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the red sedan through a dense commercial area with moderate pedestrian activity. The vehicle approaches an intersection with a pedestrian crosswalk, where a person in a yellow jacket is visible. The camera then executes a right turn at the intersection, with the red sedan continuing ahead into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched futuristic city, transitioning from the heavy concrete of highway overpasses into a vibrant commercial corridor and through a sheltered underpass. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, gliding over rain-slicked asphalt and turning right at a yellow zebra crossing past neon storefronts. As the vehicle enters a wide commercial corridor, the environment opens up into a canyon of glass facades and holographic billboards that cast colorful reflections across the wet pavement. The scene then shifts toward a palm-lined boulevard, passing a yellow taxi before plunging into the artificial light and gray walls of an enclosed concrete underpass. Finally, the camera emerges back into the open night air to follow a red sedan through a dense commercial district, eventually turning right at a pedestrian crossing as the sedan disappears into the distance.
